title: Katanas:Lava and Water
description: Add two katanas, one of lava and another of water, each with distinct abilities.
body:
# Katanas:Lava and Water(Fabric)

Add two katanas, one of lava and another of water, each with distinct abilities.

## Lava Katana
This katana applies the magma effect to enemies; this effect inflicts continuous damage similar to fire, with the difference that it doesn't get removed by coming into contact with water.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee517824ee6120e5616471f47b93e0e152ba948.png)!

## Water Katana
This katana applies the slow effect to enemies.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65e856e6bd582d32ea54da00deb88c3a0520f860.png)

### Dependencies:     
Fabricloader: ">=0.15.3"               
Fabric-api [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


### Lang:
